content.body:
observations this week:

- assessments are hard to start
- but go faster once you have the formula down
- making a copypaste template helped me scaffold out faster
- annoying that reqs and assessments are not grouped in the skeleton
- more requirements... means more assessments to write 😅
- don't try to get it 100% right initially, better to get the gist down, can come back to clean up

content.body: weather is great today but poor on the weekend, so i'm afk cycling to Edam today to check out some cheese, back on Monday
